ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

resources.title: 150 American Folk Songs to Sing, Read, and Play
resources.author: Peter Erdei (editor), Katalin Komolos (composer)
resources.rationale: Good collection of American folk songs for younger children. Includes some games and sol-fa notes.

resources.title: Can You Hear It? (Book & CD)
resources.author: William Lach
resources.rationale: Famous art paired with accessible classical music; notes interesting features of the music to listen for and begins with an introduction to various instruments of the orchestra.

resources.title: Every Moment Holy Series
resources.rationale: A modern series of prayers which follows in the same tradition as our hymn "May Jesus Christ Be Praised," looking to recognize and praise God in every extraordinary and ordinary moment.

resources.title: Kazoos
resources.author: BTOP Store
resources.rationale: Kazoo along with the term's hymn, spirituals, or folk songs as a fun way to practice learning the melody. Can use any kind of kazoo.

resources.title: Mama Lisa's World
resources.author: Mama Lisa
resources.rationale: Free site of folk songs from around the world. Often includes recordings, sheet music, and lyrics (Note: There will be discrepancies among the versions).

resources.title: Pig War: How a Porcine Tragedy Taught England and America to Share
resources.author: Emma Bland Smith

resources.title: Sing Your Part
resources.author: Sing Hymns in Parts
resources.rationale: App (accessible for free on a web browser or for $5 on the Apple Store) which teaches all four parts for each hymns. Once you sign up, you'll have to randomly select a church, and then you can search in the song library for a hymn you'd like to learn, adjust the audio for the part you'd like to hear, and then begin singing! Because of copyright restrictions, only older hymns are generally available.

resources.title: The Pig War: The Last Canada-US Border Conflcit
resources.author: Rosemary Neering
resources.rationale: This book is for older kids, from the same series as the Hudson Bay book from last year.

resources.title: Westerward Ho: The Heart of the Old West
resources.author: Diana Waring
resources.rationale: Contains a recording of The San Juan Pig.
